acceptedAnswer.text: Hand-mine Iron/Copper, build Craft Bench, make Iron Plates/Wire/Cable. Build 3-4 Biomass Burners powered by Leaves/Wood. Rush to Coal Power (Tier 3) for automated power.

mainEntity.name: What is the best Satisfactory starting location?

acceptedAnswer.text: Rocky Desert/Northern Forest: Iron, Copper, Limestone, Coal close together. Grass Fields: most space for building. Dune Desert: abundant resources, more exploration.

mainEntity.name: What's the most efficient power in Satisfactory?

acceptedAnswer.text: Coal (Tier 3): 8 generators per pure node underclocked to 75%. Fuel Generators + Diluted Fuel alt (Tier 5): mid-game. Nuclear (Tier 7): 1 Uranium node = 100GW.
